title: LagSweeper Datapack
description: Automatically removes unused or leftover entities like armor stands, dropped items, XP orbs, and mobs without equipment to reduce lag and keep your world running smoothly.
body:
### 📦 **LagSweeper – Full Description**

> **LagSweeper** is a lightweight utility datapack designed to automatically remove unused or unwanted entities from your Minecraft world. It focuses on reducing lag by clearing common clutter such as:
>
> - Armor stands without equipment
> - Dropped items
> - Experience orbs
> - Item frame
> - Projectiles
> - Boats and minecarts 

### For MultiVersion Support use -> [Entity Cleaner](https://modrinth.com/datapack/entity-cleaner)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/xfIjvYZ7gb4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

The pack **does not affect players, used armor stands, mobs with gear, or any tagged entities** meant to be preserved. It’s especially useful for survival worlds, redstone builds, or servers where performance matters.

> Optimize your world — keep it clean, fast, and free of lag!
